children.heading: Regulations
children.label: a Regulations
children.text: The Commodity Credit Corporation shall issue regulations to carry out this subchapter.

children.heading: Processing and decisions to be made as quickly as practicable
children.label: b Processing and decisions to be made as quickly as practicable
children.text: Such regulations shall establish procedures to ensure that the request for assistance by a Governor or county committee under , and individual applications of livestock producers under for assistance, are processed and decisions thereon are made as quickly as practicable.section 1471b of this titlesection 1471c of this title

children.heading: Indigenous plants not considered feed on hand
children.label: c Indigenous plants not considered feed on hand
children.text: For purposes of this subchapter, indigenous plants available to a livestock producer but not normally consumed by livestock as feed, such as cactus, may not be considered as feed on hand for such producers.
